## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`make test`)
- [ ] `make lint` and `make typecheck` pass
- [ ] Commit titles follow `[AREA] [ACTION] What it does`
- [ ] Docs/plan updated if behavior or scope changed
- [ ] No secrets committed; secret values not logged
